# Upstream Source

The files in this directory are copied from `bibtex-tidy` for compatibility
tests and benchmark fixtures.

- Source: https://github.com/FlamingTempura/bibtex-tidy
- Version observed: 1.14.0
- Commit: f98c467e27a18e937c1c221caa3a6ecd760b69fb
- License: MIT
- Copyright: Copyright (c) 2017 Peter West

The upstream corpus is test and benchmark data. It is not runtime package data.
